---
title: "The Geospatiality of STEM Learning Opportunities"
author: Kelly L. Boles
date: today
search: false
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: [simple, styles.scss]
    center-title-slide: false
    mainfont: Rubik
    slide-number: true
    cap-location: bottom
    tbl-cap-location: bottom
    chalkboard: 
      boardmarker-width: 5
    preview-links: auto
    footer: <https://klboles.github.io/job-talk-1>
execute: 
  echo: false
title-slide-attributes: 
  data-background-image: "images/title_background.png"
---

## Agenda

::: {.incremental}
1. Constructs & Frameworks
:::

## Positionality {.unnumbered .unlisted}

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

```{r}
1 + 1
```
